default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy and review new keyword research for CRM.](https://fathom.video/share/EELPpiJ843GN1m_uXxVkbk3sxZxydG71?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Focus Shift:** Prioritize AI, CRM, and engineering content. De-prioritize CEU topics to align with current product goals.](https://fathom.video/share/EELPpiJ843GN1m_uXxVkbk3sxZxydG71?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [**CRM Keyword Research:** Initial research is complete. Next, growthx will investigate "lead" keywords to inform product messaging and analyze competitor CRM keyword gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/EELPpiJ843GN1m_uXxVkbk3sxZxydG71?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [**Reporting & Access:** The October SEO report is due Nov 3. It will add a Share of Voice metric to establish a baseline for future competitor campaigns. Monograph will also fix broken read-only access to GA/GSC.](https://fathom.video/share/EELPpiJ843GN1m_uXxVkbk3sxZxydG71?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Production

  - [**Production:** 5 articles published; new keyword assignments now in the Airtable content OS.](https://fathom.video/share/EELPpiJ843GN1m_uXxVkbk3sxZxydG71?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [**Keyword Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/EELPpiJ843GN1m_uXxVkbk3sxZxydG71?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
      - **Difficulty:** Target keywords with difficulty \<60 to ensure a high probability of ranking.
      - [**Volume:** Pursue low/zero-volume keywords to own emerging topics, a strategy enabled by growthx's scalable production.](https://fathom.video/share/EELPpiJ843GN1m_uXxVkbk3sxZxydG71?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [**Prioritization:**](https://fathom.video/share/EELPpiJ843GN1m_uXxVkbk3sxZxydG71?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
      - [**Approve:** AI, CRM, and engineering-focused content.](https://fathom.video/share/EELPpiJ843GN1m_uXxVkbk3sxZxydG71?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
      - [**Hold:** CEU content.](https://fathom.video/share/EELPpiJ843GN1m_uXxVkbk3sxZxydG71?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)

### CRM Keyword Research

  - [**Status:** Initial research is complete and in Airtable, but not yet converted to topics.](https://fathom.video/share/EELPpiJ843GN1m_uXxVkbk3sxZxydG71?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [**Key Findings:**](https://fathom.video/share/EELPpiJ843GN1m_uXxVkbk3sxZxydG71?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
      - [**Cluster 2:** Targets specific A\&E sub-industries (e.g., civil engineering).](https://fathom.video/share/EELPpiJ843GN1m_uXxVkbk3sxZxydG71?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
      - [**Cluster 3:** Targets the broader A\&E industry.](https://fathom.video/share/EELPpiJ843GN1m_uXxVkbk3sxZxydG71?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [**Action Items:**](https://fathom.video/share/EELPpiJ843GN1m_uXxVkbk3sxZxydG71?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
      - [**growthx:** Investigate "lead" keywords to inform messaging for the "Leads" product.](https://fathom.video/share/EELPpiJ843GN1m_uXxVkbk3sxZxydG71?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
      - [**Monograph:** Provide a detailed CRM feature spec list to enable deeper research.](https://fathom.video/share/EELPpiJ843GN1m_uXxVkbk3sxZxydG71?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)

### Competitive Analysis

  - [**Initial Finding:** A key competitor appears to have a weak CRM keyword footprint, owning the product name but not the topic discussion.](https://fathom.video/share/EELPpiJ843GN1m_uXxVkbk3sxZxydG71?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)
  - [**Action Item:** growthx will provide a SEMrush keyword list for this competitor's CRM and AI content to visualize specific gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/EELPpiJ843GN1m_uXxVkbk3sxZxydG71?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)

### Reporting & Analytics

  - [**October SEO Report:**](https://fathom.video/share/EELPpiJ843GN1m_uXxVkbk3sxZxydG71?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)
      - [**Due:** Nov 3, to provide data for Monograph's Nov 5 board meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/EELPpiJ843GN1m_uXxVkbk3sxZxydG71?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)
      - [**New Metric:** Will add a Share of Voice metric to establish a baseline for future competitor campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/EELPpiJ843GN1m_uXxVkbk3sxZxydG71?tab=summary&timestamp=1433.0)
  - [**Analytics Access:**](https://fathom.video/share/EELPpiJ843GN1m_uXxVkbk3sxZxydG71?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
      - [**Problem:** growthx's IAM email has broken read-only access to GA and GSC.](https://fathom.video/share/EELPpiJ843GN1m_uXxVkbk3sxZxydG71?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
      - [**Impact:** Prevents testing of growthx's new Looker alternative.](https://fathom.video/share/EELPpiJ843GN1m_uXxVkbk3sxZxydG71?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
      - [**Solution:** Monograph will use the OAuth link in the agenda to re-authorize access.](https://fathom.video/share/EELPpiJ843GN1m_uXxVkbk3sxZxydG71?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Allison:**](https://fathom.video/share/EELPpiJ843GN1m_uXxVkbk3sxZxydG71?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
